case_title: HOWARD GROTHE VS. JOSEPH BEATTY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROTHE, HOWARD TRUSTEE SERVED JUL-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROTHE, HOWARD TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 840 WALLER STREET, UNIT 16, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, [AMENDED]
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROTHE, HOWARD TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 849 WALLER STREET, UNIT #16, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROTHE, HOWARD TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO X, IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF KAREN Y. UCHIYAMAN, ESQ. RE: FAIR RENTAL VALUE AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL RENTAL CONTRACT $89 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROTHE, HOWARD TRUSTEE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, JOSEPH
